name: Mushroom & Barley Miso Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large pot and sauté the onions and thyme.
2. After 5 minutes, add the mushrooms and cook for another 2 minutes.
3. Add the barley and water and bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 1 to 1 and 1/2 hours.
5. Blend one pint of the soup in a blender with the miso, garlic, salt, and soy sauce.
6. Pour the blended soup back into the soup pot, mix well, reheat, and serve garnished with lots of chopped parsley.
